message:
feat(stdlib): Complete remaining CPython stdlib features

- collections: Add namedtuple (NamedTuple, namedtupleFactory) with all methods
  (_make, _asdict, _replace, _fields, _field_defaults)
- collections: Add Counter.fromkeys and copyCounter methods
- collections: Add OrderedDict.reversed iterator and eql (order-sensitive __eq__)
- datetime: Add fromisocalendar for date and datetime
- datetime: Add astimezone and DatetimeWithTz for timezone conversion
- json: Add parse_constant parameter to JSONDecoder and loadsWithOptions
- docs: Update plan-stdlib.md to reflect completed features
